hero.title: Basava Enterprises Ltd
hero.subtitle: Construction & Engineering Experts in Steel and Concrete Structures

about.title: About Us
about.para1: Basava Enterprises Ltd is a construction and engineering company based in Lusaka, Zambia, specializing in steel fabrication and concrete structure development. We deliver reliable and high-quality solutions for industrial, commercial, and infrastructure projects.
about.para2: Our approach focuses on durability, efficiency, and precision. From planning to execution, we ensure that every project meets the highest standards of safety and quality.

services.title: Steel Fabrication
services.text: Custom structural steel fabrication for industrial and commercial projects.

services.title: Concrete Structures
services.text: Construction of strong, durable, and reliable concrete grey structures.

services.title: Project Management
services.text: Complete project planning, coordination, and execution.

services.title: Site Supervision
services.text: Professional on-site management ensuring quality and safety standards.

services.title: Structural Design Support
services.text: Engineering support for efficient and cost-effective construction.

services.title: Renovation & Maintenance
services.text: Upgrading and maintaining existing structures for long-term performance.

projects.title: Industrial Steel Structure
projects.text: Large-scale steel framework for industrial use.

projects.title: Commercial Building
projects.text: Concrete structure for a multi-purpose facility.

why.title: Engineering Expertise
why.text: Skilled professionals with strong technical knowledge.

why.title: Quality Assurance
why.text: Commitment to durable and high-standard construction.

why.title: Timely Delivery
why.text: Projects completed efficiently within agreed timelines.

why.title: Safety Focus
why.text: Strict adherence to construction safety standards.

team.name: Durga Rao Basava
team.bio: 20+ years of experience in engineering and managing projects with many successful project deliveries. Specialized in steel and concrete structure development, execution, and leadership.

team.name: Sri Basava
team.bio: Finance Manager with strong expertise in budgeting, financial planning, and business analysis. Experienced in managing company finances, optimizing costs, and supporting strategic decision-making across multiple projects.

team.name: Charan Basava
team.bio: Chief Technical Officer with extensive experience in overseeing technical operations, system architecture, and project execution. Skilled in leading engineering teams, ensuring technical excellence, and aligning technology strategies with business goals.
